seoTitle: Harvey vs Hatter Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harvey and Hatter Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Harvey vs Hatter Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harvey and Hatter Hill.
heading: Harvey vs Hatter Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harvey, Western Australia and Hatter Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harvey has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Hatter Hill (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harvey or Hatter Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harvey has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Hatter Hill scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harvey scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Hatter Hill scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harvey or Hatter Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harvey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
